metadata.name: Request an Infant Bassinet on a Flight

description: A passenger traveling with an infant on a long-haul flight wants to request a bassinet.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the passenger's booking and verify the infant is on the reservation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the booking includes an infant.

nodes.task_description: Check if the aircraft has bassinet positions and if one is available.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds an available bassinet seat at a bulkhead.

nodes.task_description: Add the bassinet request to the booking and assign the passenger to the appropriate seat.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully adds the special request and changes the seat assignment.
